message:
simplify: store hooks in LoadedPlugin, deduplicate hook discovery

Move hook discovery into LoadPlugin so LoadedPlugin.Hooks is populated
at load time, eliminating redundant discoverPluginHooks calls across
session.go and test files. Replace manual trimJSONWhitespace loop with
bytes.TrimLeft. Remove duplicate setupMinimalTestPlugin in favor of
existing makePluginDir. Extract newHookRunnerFromPlugin test helpers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
